seo_title: ScientistOne Achieves Human-Level Autonomous Research via…
meta_description: ScientistOne tackles verifiability failures in autonomous research with a novel framework and end-to-end system, achieving human-level performance on multiple…
body_html:
ScientistOne achieves zero hallucinated references and perfect score verification, outperforming human experts on multiple tasks.

Key ContributionsChain-of-Evidence (CoE): a verifiability framework requiring every claim to be traceable to its evidence source.ScientistOne: an end-to-end autonomous research system that maintains evidence chains throughout literature review, solution discovery, and paper writing.CoE Audit: a post-hoc audit with four integrity checks applying uniformly to all systems.System PerformanceTaskScoreParameter GolfState-of-the-artMLE-Bench tasksGold medalsMedical ImagingState-of-the-artFine-grained RecognitionState-of-the-art3D PerceptionState-of-the-artLanguage ModelingState-of-the-artLimitations and Future WorkFurther research is needed to explore the applicability of CoE in other domains.Improving the efficiency of CoE Audit is essential for widespread adoption.

source.title: ScientistOne: Towards Human-Level Autonomous Research via Chain-of-Evidence
source.summary: A new research system called ScientistOne has been developed to address the limitations of current autonomous research agents. The system uses a verifiability framework called Chain-of-Evidence (CoE) to ensure that all claims made by the agent are traceable to their evidence source. ScientistOne achieves zero hallucinated references, perfect score verification, and high method-code alignment, while matching or exceeding human expert performance on multiple tasks.
